name: Tito Guízar
abstract: Federico Arturo Guízar Tolentino (Spanish pronunciation: [ˈtito ˈɣisaɾ]; 8 April 1908 – 24 December 1999), known professionally as Tito Guízar, was a Mexican singer and actor. Along with Dolores del Río, Ramón Novarro and Lupe Vélez, as well as José Mojica, Guízar was among the few Mexicans who made history in the early years of Hollywoo…

about_quotes.speaker: Maxine Sullivan
about_quotes.evidence: Tito Guizar, who had this tobacco plantation -- he happened to be down in South America, and they decided that they would put on a show to raise some money to get this boat off of Tito Guizar's
